name: typescript
purpose: TypeScript compiler for strong static typing, branded domain types, and browser bundle source compilation.
licenseEvidence: npm registry metadata from `npm view typescript@6.0.3 license repository.url time --json` reported license `Apache-2.0` and repository `git+https://github.com/microsoft/TypeScript.git`.
wellKnownEvidence: TypeScript is the planned language in PLAN.md and is the standard Microsoft-maintained TypeScript compiler package.
